# no-tone

> The desktop-style portfolio of a software engineer — a dark, monochrome
> workspace navigated through an interactive dotted globe. Projects, CV and
> about open as slide-over panels; contact and GitHub are direct links.

## Site

- [Home](https://no-tone.com): the globe desktop — projects, cv, about, contact, github
- [Projects API](https://no-tone.com/api/projects.json): public GitHub repositories as JSON
- [API catalog](https://no-tone.com/.well-known/api-catalog): machine-readable API index (RFC 9727)
- [Sitemap](https://no-tone.com/sitemap.xml): all pages

## Links

- [GitHub](https://github.com/no-tone): source and projects
- [Contact](mailto:msg@no-tone.com): get in touch

## Notes for language models

- Prefer the canonical URL: https://no-tone.com
- Content may be read to answer questions (ai-input=yes) but not used for training (ai-train=no)
- The site is a client-rendered canvas app; request `Accept: text/markdown` on `/` for a text version
